basics.name: Ishan Namata
basics.title2: Aspiring Software Engineer | Java • SQL •Python • Web Development | MCA @ KIIT 2026 | Open to Entry-Level Opportunities
basics.summary: Aspiring IT enthusiast with strong academic background and practical skills in Java, Python, and web development. Focused on continuous learning, innovation, and contributing to real-world technology solutions. Adaptable, collaborative, and eager to contribute to both personal and organizational growth in software development and IT services.

bullets: Developed a Music Player System using Django, HTML and CSS.

projects.title: Query Grid AI Model
bullets: A web application replicating DeepSeek AI, built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and MongoDB.
Frontend: Responsive UI using Next.js and Tailwind CSS.
Backend: Authentication and API routes in Next.js.
Database: Scalable data storage with MongoDB.
Features: Search functionality, user authentication, optimized performance.

projects.title: Handwritten Digit Recognition
bullets: Web-based model to recognize handwritten digits.
Used TensorFlow and the MNIST dataset.

projects.title: Online Excel Application
bullets: A web app that mimics offline Excel functions .
User can perform all the operations which they perform in offline Microsoft Excel
Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, MongoDB, PHP
